title: CAMHoleRecognition Object
description: Object that represents a hole recognition object in an existing Setup, Folder or Pattern.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Set this object as the default container.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copyAfter
methods.description: Creates a duplicate of the operation in the tree after the given operation. Throws an exception if a not allowed copy operation is made for example copying a operation out of a setup.

methods.name: copyBefore
methods.description: Creates a duplicate of the operation in the tree before the given operation. Throws an exception if a not allowed copy operation is made for example copying a operation out of a setup.

methods.name: copyInto
methods.description: Creates a duplicate of the operation into the given container. You can only copy into containers, such as setups or folders. Copied operation will be copied at the end of all operations already in the container. Throws an exception if a not allowed copy operation is made for example copying a setup into a setup.

methods.name: deleteMe
methods.description: Deletes the operation from the document. In case of a setup or folder, all containing child operations will be deleted as well. Note: Child classes may overwrite this function and throw an exception if the object cannot be deleted.

methods.name: duplicate
methods.description: Creates a duplicate of the operation in the tree after the itself.

methods.name: modifyUtility
methods.description: Get ModifyUtility for the current operation by given utility type.

methods.name: moveAfter
methods.description: Move operation in tree after the given operation. Throws an exception if a not allowed move is made for example moving a operation out of a setup.

methods.name: moveBefore
methods.description: Move operation in tree before the given operation. Throws an exception if a not allowed move is made for example moving a operation out of a setup.

methods.name: moveInto
methods.description: Move operation in tree into the given container. This only works with setups, patterns and folders. Moved operation will be moved at the end of all operations already in the container. Throws an exception if a not allowed move is made for example moving a setup into a setup.

properties.name: allOperations
properties.description: Returns an array containing all of the operations in this hole recognition. This includes all operations nested in folders and patterns.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Returns the collection of attributes associated with this object.

properties.name: children
properties.description: Returns a collection containing all of the immediate (top level) child operations, folders and patterns in this folder in the order they appear in the browser.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Returns a message corresponding to any active error associated with the value of this parameter.

properties.name: folders
properties.description: Returns the Folders collection that provides access to existing folders in this hole recognition.

properties.name: generatedDataCollection
properties.description: Get the generated data associated with a given operation base instance. The type of data depends on the strategy type and might not be available for all strategy types. The available types can be found in GeneratedData.cs

properties.name: hasError
properties.description: Gets if errors were encountered when generating the operation.

properties.name: hasWarning
properties.description: Gets if problems were encountered when generating the operation.

properties.name: isActive
properties.description: Gets if this hole recognition is active.

properties.name: isLightBulbOn
properties.description: Gets if this operation is currently visible in the graphics window. Use the isLightBulbOn to change if the eye icon beside the operation node in the browser is on or not. Parent nodes in the browser can have their light bulb off which affects all of their children so this property does not indicate if the operation is actually visible, just that it should be visible if all of its parent nodes are also visible. Use the isVisible property to determine if it's actually visible.

properties.name: isOptional
properties.description: Gets and sets the "Optional" property value of the operation. Gets/sets true if the operation is optional.

properties.name: isProtected
properties.description: Gets and sets the "protected" property value of the operation. Gets/sets true if the operation is protected.

properties.name: isSelected
properties.description: Gets if this operation is selected in the 'Setups' browser.

properties.name: isSuppressed
properties.description: Gets and sets the "Suppressed" property value of the operation. Gets/sets true if the operation is suppressed.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: isVisible
properties.description: Gets if this operation is currently visible in the graphics window. Use the isLightBulbOn to change if the eye icon beside the operation node in the browser is on or not. Parent nodes in the browser can have their light bulb off which affects all of their children. This property indicates the final result and whether this operation is actually visible or not.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Gets and sets the name of the operation as seen in the browser. This name is unique as compared to the names of all other operations in the document.

properties.name: noteIconColor
properties.description: The color of the note icon. This represents the color of the note icon in the browser, which is displayed next to the operation name when the operation has notes.

properties.name: notes
properties.description: Gets and sets the notes of the operation.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: operationId
properties.description: Returns the id of the operation. This id is unique as compared to the ids of all other operations in the document. This id will not change when changing the order or parent of the operation. This id will remain valid when the document is saved and reloaded.

properties.name: operations
properties.description: Returns the Operations collection that provides access to existing individual operations in this hole recognition.

properties.name: parameters
properties.description: Gets the CAMParameters collection for this operation.

properties.name: parent
properties.description: Returns the parent Setup, Folder or Pattern for this Folder.

properties.name: parentSetup
properties.description: Gets the Setup this operation belongs to.

properties.name: strategy
properties.description: Gets the name of the strategy associated with this operation.

properties.name: warning
properties.description: Returns a message corresponding to any active warning associated with the value of this parameter.

activate.title: CAMHoleRecognition.activate Method
activate.description: Set this object as the default container.

syntax.python: returnValue = cAMHoleRecognition_var.activate()
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = cAMHoleRecognition_var->activate();

activate.return_description: Returns true if the activation was successful.

classType.title: CAMHoleRecognition.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

syntax.python: returnValue = adsk.cam.CAMHoleRecognition.classType()
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = adsk::cam::CAMHoleRecognition::classType();

classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copyAfter.title: CAMHoleRecognition.copyAfter Method
copyAfter.description: Creates a duplicate of the operation in the tree after the given operation. Throws an exception if a not allowed copy operation is made for example copying a operation out of a setup.

syntax.python: returnValue = cAMHoleRecognition_var.copyAfter(operation)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = cAMHoleRecognition_var->copyAfter(operation);

copyAfter.return_description: Returns if copy command was successful.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Operation to copy targeted operation after.

copyInto.title: CAMHoleRecognition.copyInto Method
copyInto.description: Creates a duplicate of the operation into the given container. You can only copy into containers, such as setups or folders. Copied operation will be copied at the end of all operations already in the container. Throws an exception if a not allowed copy operation is made for example copying a setup into a setup.

syntax.cpp:

copyInto.return_description: Returns if copy command was successful.

parameters.name: container
parameters.description: Container to copy targeted operation into.

modifyUtility.title: CAMHoleRecognition.modifyUtility Method
modifyUtility.description: Get ModifyUtility for the current operation by given utility type.

syntax.python: returnValue = cAMHoleRecognition_var.modifyUtility(utility)
syntax.cpp:

modifyUtility.return_description: Returns ModifyUtility for specific type or null if the type is not compatible with the operation.
